consent_event.language_text: By checking this box and submitting, you agree to receive transactional text messages from Murfreesboro Home Pros about this service request, including automated messages. You also authorize us to share the details of this request with one selected local service partner at a time for the purpose of coordinating your request. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out or HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See SMS Terms and Privacy Notice. Separate consent is required for promotional messages.
consent_event.scope: transactional service-request coordination; one selected local service partner at a time

adapter_requirements.crm: Twenty via scoped internal adapter over REST/GraphQL/webhooks
